3129280.name: Lovely Slime Galaxy
3129280.description:
Help Popyu journey across the galaxy in this 3D platforming adventure. Mastering a diverse move-set will help you along the way as you meet new friends, battle fearsome foes, and unravel the mysterious forces at work in the galaxy!

FEATURES
  • Easy to play with a deep moveset to master
  • Multiple Planets, each with a unique theme
  • Towns offer open exploration and slimy friends to speak with
  • Flex your expertise over the linear stages or take them at your own pace
  • Triumph over the terrorizing boss fights
  • Deck out Popyu with unlockable cosmetics and colors hidden throughout the galaxy
